title: Login page crashing on Safari
description: Users reporting a white screen when attempting to log in using Safari v17.4.

title: Update logo in email templates
description: Replace the old branding with the new high-res SVG logo in all outgoing system emails.

title: Slow database queries on Dashboard
description: The 'Recent Activity' widget is taking over 5 seconds to load for enterprise accounts.

title: Add 'Export to PDF' feature
description: Customer requested the ability to export monthly reports directly to PDF format.

title: Password reset link expiring too fast
description: Links are expiring in 5 minutes instead of the documented 30 minutes.

title: API Rate Limit increase request
description: Client needs an increase from 1k to 5k requests per hour for their migration script.

title: Dark mode toggle flickering
description: Screen flashes bright white for a split second when switching themes.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Stripe integration is timing out during peak traffic hours (12 PM - 2 PM).

title: Broken link in footer
description: The 'Careers' link leads to a 404 page.

title: Mobile navigation menu won't close
description: On Android Chrome, clicking the 'X' button doesn't retract the menu.

title: Bulk user upload failing
description: CSV uploads with more than 50 rows are returning a 500 Server Error.
